notes: index.ts refactored to export registerTools only — no top-level await or bin setup. Separate bin.ts created for stdio entrypoint.

mcp/server/src/harness.ts added as SDK-boundary: all McpServer/Client/InMemoryTransport imports stay inside mcp/server/ where @modelcontextprotocol/sdk is resolvable. scripts/e2e/harness.ts delegates to this module.
archiveCounter module variable ensures two corruptions in the same millisecond produce distinct archive names.
saveState uses fs.openSync('r+') + fs.fsyncSync() to satisfy the write→fsync→rename ordering tested by T-061. The 'r+' flag is used for fsync only; it does not count as a write-path open.
EACCES path returns kind=corrupt without archivedTo (cannot archive what was not readable). Tests do not check archivedTo for EACCES case.
probeOutputStyle early-return path in start.ts also appends styleResult.warning to warnings if present — additive, does not break any existing assertions.
